data.q: Which PHP function returns the length of a string?
data.e: strlen() returns the number of characters in a string.

data.q: Which function converts a string to uppercase in PHP?
data.e: strtoupper() converts all alphabetic characters in a string to uppercase.

data.q: Which PHP function is used to split a string into an array?
data.e: explode() splits a string into an array using a delimiter.

data.q: What does implode() do in PHP?
o: Joins array elements into a string
data.e: implode() joins array elements together into a single string.

data.q: Which function removes whitespace from both ends of a string?
data.e: trim() removes whitespace and optional characters from both ends of a string.

data.q: Which function checks whether a value exists in an array?
data.e: in_array() checks whether a given value exists inside an array.

data.q: Which function adds an element to the end of an array?
data.e: array_push() appends one or more elements to the end of an array.

data.q: Which PHP function sorts an array in ascending order?
data.e: sort() sorts indexed arrays in ascending order.

data.q: What does count() return when used on an array?
data.e: count() returns the number of elements present in an array.

data.q: Which function is used to replace text inside a string?
data.e: str_replace() replaces occurrences of a search string with another string.
